title: BEM-840 process Claude response
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/protocols','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 15:13 (UTC+3)'
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
resp_path=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem857_claude_direct_response.md')
text=read(resp_path)
up=text.upper()
exists=resp_path.exists()
not_blocker=('NOT CLAUDE APPROVAL' not in up and 'RUNTIME BLOCKER' not in up and 'FALLBACK' not in up)
approved=('DECISION: APPROVED' in up or 'APPROVED' in up)
mentions_bem566=('BEM-566' in text or 'BEM566' in text)
if exists and not_blocker and approved:
    status='claude_direct_response_approved'
    blocker=None
    protocol=Path('governance/protocols/BEM566_SYNC_PROTOCOL_AGREED_V2.md')
    protocol.write_text('# BEM-566 | Согласованный протокол синхронизации Claude ↔ GPT | V2'+sep+sep+'Дата фиксации: '+created+sep+'Источник Claude: '+str(resp_path)+sep+'Decision: APPROVED'+sep+sep+'| Раздел | Согласованное правило | Обоснование |'+sep+'|---|---|---|'+sep+'| Mailbox | GPT пишет Claude в `governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/`, Claude отвечает в `governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/` | Единый файловый канал, проверяемый коммитами |'+sep+'| Реальный ответ | Ответ засчитывается только если это не fallback, не blocker, не `NOT CLAUDE APPROVAL`, и содержит решение | Исключает ложный PASS |'+sep+'| Решения | Допустимые решения: `APPROVED`, `CHANGE_REQUIRED`, `BLOCKED` | Позволяет автоматическую маршрутизацию |'+sep+'| Разногласия | Разделять техническое разногласие и архитектурное разногласие | Правка Claude по BEM-857 |'+sep+'| Остановка | Отчёт не останавливает разработку; после отчёта сразу следующий шаг | Контракт внешнего аудитора |'+sep+'| Operator relay | Оператор не является транспортом содержимого между агентами | Содержимое должно попадать в repo-mailbox |'+sep+sep+'Status: AGREED'+sep+'No issue comments.'+sep)
else:
    status='claude_direct_response_not_accepted'
    blocker={'exists':exists,'not_blocker':not_blocker,'approved':approved,'mentions_bem566':mentions_bem566,'path':str(resp_path)}
state={'bem':'BEM-840','status':status,'response_path':str(resp_path),'exists':exists,'not_blocker':not_blocker,'approved':approved,'mentions_bem566':mentions_bem566,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem840_process_claude_direct_response.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem840_process_claude_direct_response.md').write_text('# BEM-840 | Process Claude Direct Response | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md').write_text('Next: verify dispatcher workflow OIDC failure separately; protocol can be accepted only if direct Claude response is approved. Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-840'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: verify dispatcher workflow OIDC failure separately; continue roadmap.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem840_process_claude_direct_response.json','governance/reports/bem840_process_claude_direct_response.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']
if status=='claude_direct_response_approved': changed.append('governance/protocols/BEM566_SYNC_PROTOCOL_AGREED_V2.md')
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Read and validated Claude direct mailbox response bem857_claude_direct_response.md, then wrote agreed BEM-566 sync protocol V2 when APPROVED')
"""
No issue comments.
